title: rosa scabrata f. istrica
intro: Rosa scabrata f. istrica, also known as Istirian wild rose, is a species of rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rosa scabrata f. istrica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antiseptic, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
